reviews.title: Very happy with Market Harborough, a niche lender
reviews.body:
Very happy with Market Harborough, a niche lender
I had a face to face meeting with the Market Harborough BDM (Rohan Hardeman) he was very helpful and knowledgeable and assisted me with placing the application. The underwriter (Melanie Pettit) was excellent, it was so good to have direct access to underwriter it made the process so much smoother.
Everyone at MHBS is very helpful. They look for ways of trying to help rather than reasons not to lend

reviews.title: As always, MHBS deliver a fantastic product and service.
reviews.body:
As always, MHBS deliver a fantastic product and service.
Lisa and Nicky were superb. The case was a heavy refurbishment and therefore complex, however, they made the underwriting process as smooth and painless as a case like this allows. 

The client also enjoyed his pre-Offer call with Nicky, and thought it was good to be able to speak to the Underwriter dealing with his case as part of the application process.

reviews.title: Service like this gives us confidence to recommend MHBS
reviews.body:
Service like this gives us confidence to recommend MHBS
From initial contact with Jonathan on the bridging team, to regional support from BDM Rohan and finally prompt and efficient underwriting form Liz. Just what brokers need.

reviews.title: brilliant lender
reviews.body:
brilliant lender
Liz is fab!

reviews.title: Smooth and Professional Bridging Finance Experience with Keiran Armstrong
reviews.body:
Smooth and Professional Bridging Finance Experience with Keiran Armstrong
I recently arranged bridging finance through Market Harborough Building Society and had an excellent experience, largely thanks to Keiran Armstrong. Keiran was extremely knowledgeable and supportive throughout the process, keeping things moving efficiently and always making himself available to answer questions or provide updates.

Bridging finance can often feel complex or stressful, but Keiran's clear communication and proactive approach made it all feel very manageable. I really appreciated his professionalism and commitment to getting things over the line smoothly.

Would highly recommend both Keiran and MHBS for anyone considering bridging finance.
Ian Pickles was always highly communicative and responsive.
Liz was super friendly and gave up updates throughout the process. Clients were also very happy with their experience!

Although there was an initial delay in the application reaching the underwriter, Ian Pickles has made the customer journey exceptionally smooth. His direct communication and prompt responses to queries have been outstanding—I cannot recommend him highly enough.

This was my first experience with MH, and thanks to Ian’s support, I’ll definitely be using MH more frequently in the future. He truly is a game changer.

reviews.title: Amazing
reviews.body:
Amazing
Quick to respond , a "can do" attitude , a process that puts many larger banks to shame
Fantasitc - havent placed with you for a while. Found the underwriters 1st class

reviews.title: Would highly recommend.
reviews.body:
Would highly recommend.
Liz was brilliant from start to finish.

reviews.title: as per previous
reviews.body:
as per previous
Client is employed as an Optician for Specsavers and recently had an opportunity to become a partner at one of their branches and all the associates subsidiary services specsavers offers.  The client was replacing one of the partners and so there was years of history of the income the business he had recently joined had generated, along with evidence of 6 months trading the client was already in receipt of the income from the business as well as the employed income.  Having spoken to MHBS at initial enquiry, i spoke with Kapil Parmer explained the situ and that i don't have any accounts in the clients name as he's recently just joined the business partnership.  Kapil, talked me through the case in such great detail. He was always the one to pick up the phone and so was great to have continuinity with discussing this case.  Kapil was absolutely awesome! Prompt, knowledgeable, easy to understand, very clear and absolutely blindingly brilliant!!!! One awesome guy who knows his stuff.  I had probably made in total around 10 calls pre application re this case from outset of which I have spoken to Capel 50% of the time (maybe that in itself, says something) but every time I speak to him, I come away feeling very confident with the info had given,  the expectation, timescales and how I go forward in advising my client.  100% exceptional service and huge asset to MHBS! 

I then proceeded to a DIP.
Once the DIP was submitted, again needed some back and forth support with it; and again, Kapil to the rescue.  The local BDM immediately also contacted me to check-in and offer any support, also a fab service, but by that point Kapil had given helped with what I required.  Then onto the full APP once the client had then found a property to proceed with.....
Just when i thought the service could not get any better, I was presented with Ian Pickles, Senior Underwriter.  All I can say is WOW!!! I have pure admiration and appreciation of Ian's time spent on this case, his attentiveness, his common-sense approach and most of all, his level of communication at every point. It was a complex case and from initial enquiry to inception - MHBS, presented by Kapil and Ian has been extraordinary. I have to admit, that sometimes a little afraid of the process with placing business with smaller Building society, but this experience has completely change by view and confidence.  I look forward to working with MHBS in the near future, will certainly not hesitate to send business your way.  Honestly, very grateful for Ian and Kapil.  A very special thanks to them :)

Kindest Regards,
Runouska Dass.

reviews.title: Market Harborough were brilliant.
reviews.body:
Market Harborough were brilliant.
Melanie the underwriter was brilliant. Kept us up to date and was trying to find a way to solve the problem not find ways to reject the application.

reviews.title: A great lender I would happily recommend!
reviews.body:
A great lender I would happily recommend!
Very friendly and approachable with a definite 'can do' attitude...this is something that a lot of the mainstream lenders could learn from. As previously mentioned, my two contact points at Market Harborough Building Society, Amanda Hicks and Nikki Booton are absolute stars!

reviews.title: Fantastic service. MHBS have the ability to handle the most complex cases.
reviews.body:

Darren Evans the Underwriter was superb, as were Will Edwards and Chris Thompson in dealing with the enquiry at the pre-application stage.

reviews.title: Impressed with service and professionalism of the team
reviews.body:
Impressed with service and professionalism of the team
Very professional and helpful. Responded to any queries quickly and comprehensively. Went above and beyond expectations
The team were very quick to react & also expediate completion

reviews.title: Working with MHBS was a very pleasurable experience from the start.
reviews.body:
Working with MHBS was a very pleasurable experience from the start.
Melanie was amazing throughout the whole process. She was very communicative and responded in a very timely manner
The application process was easy from intial enquiry, through the underwriting and product of offer.

reviews.title: Great experience
reviews.body:
Great experience
Keiran Armstrong, as always, was highly responsive, diligent, proactive, and easy to deal with.
Keiran Armstrong was excellent - thank you!

reviews.title: Amazing BDM, great service!
reviews.body:
Amazing BDM, great service!
I worked with Alex Doveston on a complex case for a HNW client, from the first call, he was fantastic, he was enthusiastic and confident.
The process took longer than anticipated, he kept me calm throughout. I can't fault him. Looking forward to working with him again.

reviews.title: MHBS provided a solution when other lenders couldn't
reviews.body:
MHBS provided a solution when other lenders couldn't
MHBS were the only FCA regulated lender on our panel who would keep lend on a 1st charge, FCA regulated bridge, where the client is securing the charge across two properties, where the purchase includes 36 acres of arable, farmland and they valued the whole site, inc. land. All other  lenders on panel would only value the house with 2 acres, which would have reduced the loan by around £300k. A market leading rate was secured. The team were very professional and thorough throughout. There are a lot of questions upfront and the underwriting requirements are heavy Vs alternative lenders in this space, but over all, MHBS delivered a product perfect for my client's needs and that was the best outcome. Just took a bit longer than usual deals. Still very impressed with communication throughout. Special mention and thanks to William Edwards and Keiran Armstrong.

reviews.title: A good client outcome.
reviews.body:
A good client outcome.
All very helpful and Keiran Armstrong was responsive throughout to get the case through to offer successfully.

reviews.title: Bespoke and personable service
reviews.body:
Bespoke and personable service
A great effort to understand the client, their requirements and help to tailor a solution.  Prepared to consider with a sensible approach all aspects and challenge the process
Liz and Lisa delivered outstanding service from start to finish. Their professionalism, responsiveness, and genuine care made all the difference. Truly a pleasure to work with!

reviews.title: Great experience for a HNW client
reviews.body:
Great experience for a HNW client
Chris Thompson was very helpful getting the case approved at AIP stage, Amanda Hicks was very efficient with packaging the case and then Ian Pickles showed he was a senior underwriter as he understood the clients situation which was complex but also approved the loan quickly which was appreciated as we had a deadline to complete the remortgage at the end of this month.

reviews.title: THis is the place to go for bridging for elderly borrowers!
reviews.body:
THis is the place to go for bridging for elderly borrowers!
Keiran couldn't have been more helpful - excellent communications and super positive.
The team were always easy to get hold of and you were able to liaise with each necessary team throughout the process which made everything smoother and easier.

reviews.title: Happy doing business with MHBS and will continue to place cases with them
reviews.body:
Happy doing business with MHBS and will continue to place cases with them
Rohan, the Business development manager has to take alot of credit for his knowledge and helpfulness and being available to discuss cases.  He always returns calls, and follows up to see how your getting on.
Generally the team do their best to help where they can with complex cases.  If you have a complex case they are experts to help your clients with their mortgage needs.
always in contact and no silly delays

reviews.title: Will definitely use again and will definitely recommend to others
reviews.body:

reviews.title: Very happy with the service
reviews.body:
Very happy with the service
Your team provided very efficient service and communication was superb. The team was very responsive and very helpful throughout the process

reviews.title: breath of fresh air when dealing with a lender!
reviews.body:
breath of fresh air when dealing with a lender!
The MHBS were amazing from start to finish. From my initial enquiry to discuss the case through to my case handler Lisa and Underwriter Liz, who were on hand to answer any questions needed and were willing to pick up the phone and talk through details. The ability to speak to case handlers and underwriter was fantastic and much more refreshing than a different person each time I needed to call

reviews.title: from enquiry to offer takes far too long
reviews.body:
from enquiry to offer takes far too long
They are very helpful but there is non sense of urgency

reviews.title: MHBS stands out as the top choice among bridging lenders. Their pragmatic a
reviews.body:
MHBS stands out as the top choice among bridging lenders. Their pragmatic a
In a sentence, this lender is miles ahead of the rest. I work with many bridging lenders, and MHBS is always by far the preferred choice. Their approach to underwriting is both pragmatic and efficient, often key for clients who are seeking short term funding. MHBS's rates are often the most competitive, and their underwriters are a pleasure to work with, having a positive and solution-focused attitude to getting cases over the line. A well-deserved 5*. I couldn't recommend them highly enough.

reviews.title: Nicky Vaughan excellent
reviews.body:
Nicky Vaughan excellent

reviews.body:
